chief_complaint: A patient, whose age and sex are not specified, presented with symptoms leading to a diagnosis of end-stage arrhythmogenic right ventricular cardiomyopathy (ARVC) necessitating heart transplantation.
history: The patient was diagnosed with ARVC fulfilling the task force criteria and underwent successful heart transplantation. Years later, the patient developed similar symptoms and morphofunctional changes of the heart, prompting a re-evaluation of the primary diagnosis.
labs: Not specified, but the patient had findings consistent with ARVC and later developed symptoms and changes suggestive of cardiac sarcoidosis after heart transplantation.
